name: MCP OpenGrok
description: Search OpenGrok using various methods (full text, definitions, symbols, file paths, file types).

project.description: Name of the project to search in

query.description: The text string to search for inside files

tools.name: search_definition
tools.description: Search for definitions (e.g., function or class names)

project.description: Name of the project to search in

definition.description: Definition name to search for (e.g., a function or class)

tools.name: search_symbol
tools.description: Search for references to a symbol (e.g., variable, function call)

project.description: Name of the project to search in

symbol.description: Symbol name to search for references

project.description: Name of the project to search in

filepath.description: Path or filename to search for

tools.name: search_by_type
tools.description: Search for files by type (e.g., Python, C++)

project.description: Name of the project to search in

type.description: File type to search for (e.g., python, cpp, c, java)
